side_compiler.note: Must use GOTOOLCHAIN=local to prevent toolchain directive override.

optimization_backlog.name: doCompact-inlining-via-newinliner
optimization_backlog.note: GOEXPERIMENT=newinliner marks doCompact inlinable (cost 120 < budget 160) but call-site score 120 > maxCost 80 prevents actual inlining. PGO shows 50% improvement when doCompact is inlined. Need scoring adjustment or budget increase for non-runtime packages.

optimization_backlog.name: walk-bce-reverse-iteration
optimization_backlog.note: g.revs[l-i-1] BCE not eliminated because l is captured separately from len(g.revs) in SSA; prove pass can't correlate them across basic blocks

optimization_backlog.name: enable-newinliner
optimization_backlog.note: newinliner experiment exists but doesn't help doCompact due to call-site scoring. Need custom scoring adj.

attempt_log.name: findGeneration-cost-reduction
attempt_log.detail: OCONTINUE/OBREAK zero-cost enabled inlining but IndexGet regressed +7.18%

attempt_log.name: prove-strict-sub-todos
attempt_log.detail: Enabled TODO in detectSubRelations (strict ordering gives signedMin 1). No BCE eliminated in mvcc; geomean -0.24% (noise).

attempt_log.name: raise-budget-100
attempt_log.detail: Breaks runtime/proc.go (assembly expects certain functions not inlined)

attempt_log.name: closure-cost-reduction
attempt_log.detail: Reducing closure cost 15->5 doesn't change doCompact's own cost (closure is inside doCompact)

task_substitutions: Tasks 4,5 selected. Task 1 substituted (side compiler rebuild). Task 4: explored multiple approaches (prove-strict-sub-todos, budget increase, newinliner experiment, closure cost). None yielded improvement. Key finding: PGO shows 50% win from doCompact inlining but no path to achieve without PGO currently.
